name: iosm-cli
description: Standalone IOSM CLI with agent tooling, session management, and IOSM artifact orchestration

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run copy-assets
scripts.deploy-local: npm run build && rsync -a --delete dist/ "$(node -e "console.log(require('child_process').execSync('volta which iosm').toString().trim().replace(/\/bin\/iosm$/, '/lib/node_modules/iosm-cli/dist'))")/"
scripts.build:binary: npm run build && bun build --compile ./dist/cli.js --outfile dist/iosm && npm run copy-binary-assets
scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/modes/interactive/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/core/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/core/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/core/export-html/vendor/
scripts.copy-binary-assets: shx cp package.json dist/ && shx cp README.md dist/ && shx cp CHANGELOG.md dist/ && shx mkdir -p dist/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html dist/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/export-html/vendor/ && shx cp -r docs dist/ && shx cp -r examples dist/ && shx cp node_modules/@silvia-odwyer/photon-node/photon_rs_bg.wasm dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
